title: Luxurious Ethiopian Lentil Flatbread
description: A traditional Ethiopian dish featuring crusty flatbread filled with spicy lentils, perfect for a vegan-friendly meal. This recipe combines the flavors of Ethiopia with a crunchy and indulgent twist.

ingredients.name: lentils
ingredients.notes: green or brown lentils work well

instructions: Rinse the lentils and soak them in water for at least 30 minutes.
Drain and boil the lentils in 2 cups of water until they are tender.
Saute the onion, garlic, and ginger in olive oil until the onion is translucent.
Add the berbere spice to the onion mixture and stir for 1 minute.
Combine the cooked lentils with the onion mixture and season with salt.
In a separate bowl, mix the flour, yeast, and salt.
Gradually add water to the flour mixture to form a dough.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Let the dough rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Divide the dough into 4-6 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a thin circle and cook for 1-2 minutes on each side.
